summary: Frontend-only validation completed for full-width and pastel multi-color UI updates across role boards on public URL. All requested visual/layout behaviors and pre-sales view switching passed.
action_items: No blocking issues found in requested scope.
Optional: investigate recurring console hydration warning about <span> inside <option> during role board rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: Console reports HTML nesting/hydration warning ('<span> cannot be a child of <option>'); not blocking tested flows but should be cleaned to reduce future rendering risk.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used frontend/.env public URL and validated with manual login for presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123 and admin@fitsiomax.com/admin123. Verified full-width header/board wrapper, pastel stage tabs, pastel kanban columns, color-coded action buttons, admin top flow stage-card colors, and pre-sales kanban/list switching without regression.
rca of the issue: No functional defect reproduced for requested changes. Non-blocking console warning likely tied to rendered option child structure in runtime instrumentation/render path.
mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs used in this run; tested against live public endpoints.
